name: Make a Game Move

---

## 🎮 Make Your Move

Choose your game and enter your move:

### Tic-Tac-Toe
```
start ttt
```
or
```
A1
```
(Valid positions: A1-C3)

### Reversi
```
start reversi
```
or
```
D3
```
(Valid positions: A1-H8)

### Number Guess
```
start guess
```
or
```
50
```
(Valid numbers: 1-100)

---

**Note:** The game will automatically update the README after your move!
